{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",

  "component_conditions": [
    "installed-defective"

  "percent_complete": 85,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Excessive cold spring used to force piping alignment",
    "High residual stress introduced into the piping system and connected equipment nozzles"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Loosen the flange bolts and support clamps to release the forced alignment stress",
    "Re-align the piping spool naturally by adjusting supports or cutting and re-welding the spool to fit without force",
    "Inspect connected equipment nozzles for distortion or damage"
  ],
  "rationale": "Using excessive force (unintentional cold spring) to align piping flanges introduces severe residual stresses that violate ASME B31.3 alignment tolerances and can overload equipment nozzles, leading to premature fatigue or failure.",
  "references": [
    "ASME B31.3 Section 335 (Assembly and Erection)",
    "ASME B31.3 Section 335.1.1 (Alignment)"
  ]
}
